ce_source_paths.reason: Complete CE source runtime exposing local authentication, PostgreSQL-backed projects/repositories, scan/finding/report APIs, health, capability, and evidence contracts without SaaS, billing, or commercial provider adapters.

Complete CE worker source runtime claiming durable PostgreSQL scan jobs, cloning credential-free public repositories, running native secrets/IaC/SAST/dependency checks, and persisting findings without hosted callbacks or commercial adapters.
